serverInfo.name: com.sap.s4/business-partner-api
serverInfo.title: SAP Business Partner API MCP Server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for managing business partners via the SAP Business Partner OpenAPI

tools.name: list_business_partners
tools.title: List Business Partners
tools.description: Retrieve a list of business partners. Supports filtering by name, country, and type.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData-style filter expression. Example: BusinessPartnerCategory eq '1'.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip. Use together with 'top' for pagination.

tools.name: get_business_partner
tools.title: Get Business Partner
tools.description: Retrieve a single business partner by their unique ID.

parameters.name: BusinessPartner
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the business partner (e.g. '1000001').

tools.name: create_business_partner
tools.title: Create Business Partner
tools.description: Create a new business partner record.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The business partner data to create. Must include at minimum: BusinessPartnerCategory and OrganizationBPName1.

tools.name: update_business_partner
tools.title: Update Business Partner
tools.description: Update fields of an existing business partner by ID.

parameters.name: BusinessPartner
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the business partner to update.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Fields to update on the business partner. Only include fields that should change.
